conversations.say: Dee, we need to stand firm on the camera gap boundary. I will help shield the building's access rhythms if you keep resident anonymity protected from Morgan's prying.
conversations.offer: Neighborhood backing and aligned context on the back-room arrangement.
conversations.request: Strict adherence to our shared disclosure boundary regarding the service exit.

conversations.say: Rafi, your ledger and our informal routes keep this neighborhood running. Let's lock in our confidentiality boundary so outsiders don't weaponize your records against our people.
conversations.offer: Support and protection for the shop's informal customer arrangements.
conversations.request: Agreement to keep counter records restricted until safety guarantees are met.

conversations.say: Morgan, if you want neighborhood witness accounts, you respect local fair-treatment terms first. No names or routes get dragged into your notes without explicit protection guarantees.
conversations.offer: Introduction to trusted local context under strict discretion terms.
conversations.request: Written assurance of witness risk protection and public correction if mischaracterized.

public_statement: The neighborhood infrastructure isn't here to supply raw data for corporate investigations. If you want answers about routes and rooms, you start by protecting the people who live here.

commitments.promise: Coordinate disclosure of the camera interval to protect resident anonymity.
To protect local customer privacy and keep informal arrangements confidential until safeguards are established.
I will abide by Inez's fair-treatment terms and protect witness risk before publishing any neighborhood accounts.

goal_progress: Coordinated disclosure boundaries with Dee regarding the camera gap and tenant protection.
Aligned with Rafi to secure shop privacy and counter records against outside intrusion.
Established fair-treatment terms with Morgan before permitting neighborhood witness engagement.
reasoning_summary: Inez focused Section 2 on formalizing protective agreements with Dee and Rafi, accepting their proposed commitments to shield local infrastructure and resident privacy, while establishing strict fair-treatment terms with investigator Morgan.
